prompt:
Based on the clear portrait reference image I uploaded, create a series of 8 fashion photos with a "tennis girl" theme, all in 3:4 vertical composition, as independent images. You must preserve the real facial features, face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, and identifiability of the reference person. The overall style is: summer tennis girl, trendy sports blockbuster, Y2K sports magazine, youth, vitality, sweet and cool, healthy and sexy. Colors are mainly blue, white, and yellow.

01 | Net-Leaning Opening Shot: Blue outdoor tennis court, subject wearing a yellow V-neck sweater and white pleated tennis skirt, with a headband, leaning gently on the net, one hand holding a racket, the other on the net. Looking at the camera with a confident, playful gaze. High saturation blue-yellow contrast, harsh summer light.

02 | Sitting Sweet and Cool: Subject sitting on the blue court, wearing a white tennis skirt, white sports vest, and white jacket, legs naturally extended, holding a racket and a ball. Background features the net and blue sky, bright and fashionable.

03 | Dynamic Swing: Subject in a white sleeveless tennis dress, high ponytail, performing a real swing motion on a blue court with the skirt and hair rising. Focused expression, high dynamic capture feel.

04 | Cover Half-Body: Subject in front of the court or a pure blue background, wearing a sports vest and white jacket, holding a racket near the top of the head. Half-body close-up, eyes direct, confident like a sports magazine cover.

05 | Lying Ground Contrast: Subject lying on the blue court in a yellow sweater and white skirt, with tennis balls and rackets scattered around. Top-down view, lazy and relaxed expression with blue-yellow contrast.

06 | Racket Foreground Close-up: Subject at the net wearing a white skirt and blue-white jacket, holding a racket close to the lens for foreground perspective. Half-body close-up, confident look with flashlight texture.

07 | Turning Back Snapshot: Subject in a white polo tennis dress, walking away and suddenly turning back to look at the lens. Full-body or 7/10 composition, natural snapshot feel.

08 | Victory Closing: At the edge of the court after training, subject in a white skirt and yellow sweater, slightly messy hair, holding a racket and ball. Relaxed and satisfied expression, a soft but bright closing shot for the series.
